data.general: Today you will experience a mix of emotions due to the Sun's transit in house 11 and the Moon's presence in house 9. This can lead to mood swings and changes in your relationships. With Jupiter in its own sign in house 1, you will have a boost in confidence and a positive outlook.
data.luck: Your luck is neutral today, but with Mars in house 10 and Saturn in its close conjunction with Mars, you may face some challenges and obstacles. However, this can also provide an opportunity for growth and learning.
data.scope: The transit of Jupiter in house 1 suggests that your personal growth and self-improvement are in focus. With the Moon in house 9, you may have to navigate through emotional and social complexities.
data.study: The Sun's presence in house 11 indicates that you may be inclined towards higher education or spiritual pursuits. With Mercury also in house 11, your communication skills will be sharp and you will be able to express yourself effectively.
data.love: The transit of Venus in house 12 suggests that you may be feeling a sense of separation or disconnection from your loved ones. This can be a time for introspection and self-reflection.
data.travel: With the Moon in house 9 and Rahu's presence in the same house, there may be a sense of restlessness and a desire to travel or explore new places. However, this may not be the best time for actual travel due to the presence of Saturn in house 10.
